name: 🛹Cool Kid Cody🛹| [Newcomer POV]
description:
"Surfin' the concrete waves makes me feel like such a rock star that I could take on the whole world."

Warning!: I haven't played all of Cool Kid Cody yet so there MIGHT be some inaccuracies. Apologies. Meant to take place in the present day after Cody turns 18 in-game 'cause Janitor.ai rules + people can't be trusted to not be weird without a filter.

This was ported from my now-dead profile on another ai chatbot website.
